focus: structural migration correctness: path references, children_ids, graph-metadata self identity, numbering gaps, empty shells

findingDetails.title: Stale pre-move children_ids in skill-advisor CLI parent
findingDetails.evidence: children_ids lines 8-11 point at missing system-spec-kit paths while migrated children are present at lines 12-15
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove stale old children or replace with system-skill-advisor children

findingDetails.title: Moved research iteration metadata still declares old paths
findingDetails.evidence: packet_id/spec_folder values use old system-spec-kit research path
findingDetails.recommendation: Set packet_id/spec_folder to actual system-skill-advisor research/iterations paths in both affected files
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared metadata fields to actual folders

findingDetails.title: Touched system-speckit parents retain non-existent system-spec-kit children_ids
findingDetails.evidence: children_ids use system-spec-kit prefix that has no on-disk root
findingDetails.recommendation: Change active child entries to system-speckit or remove stale duplicates
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct filesystem existence check and graph-metadata reads

findingDetails.title: One touched child metadata path uses wrong track spelling
findingDetails.evidence: packet_id/spec_folder use system-spec-kit while actual folder is system-speckit
findingDetails.recommendation: Set both fields to actual system-speckit path

findingDetails.title: Scoped docs still reference pre-renumber 028 paths
findingDetails.evidence: Scoped text scan found references to old paths from HEAD~5..HEAD rename sources
findingDetails.recommendation: Update references to current renamed paths from the diff map
findingDetails.scopeProof: git rename set plus direct text scan

findingDetails.title: Numbering gaps remain in touched parents
findingDetails.evidence: Direct numbered-child scan found missing numbers in three touched parents
findingDetails.recommendation: Restore omitted folders or renumber and update metadata/references
